# Gemika

> Modern Portfolio and AI-Optimized Theme

This site provides information about Gemika, its projects, and articles.

## Articles

- [AI in Education: Transforming Learning for the Future](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/ai-in-education-transforming-learning/index.md) - How artificial intelligence is revolutionizing education and shaping the future of learning.
- [AI in Space Exploration: Navigating the Cosmos](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/ai-in-space-exploration/index.md) - How artificial intelligence is powering the next era of space discovery.
- [Building Accessible Mobile Applications](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/building-accessible-mobile-apps/index.md) -
- [Color Psychology in UI Design: Beyond Aesthetics](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/color-psychology-ui/index.md) -
- [Design Systems: Beyond the Basics](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/design-systems-beyond-basics/index.md) -
- [The Future of UX Design in 2024](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/future-of-ux-design/index.md) -
- [The Power of Microinteractions in Creating Delightful User Experiences](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/microinteractions-ux/index.md) -
- [Why Mobile-First Design Still Matters in 2024](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/mobile-first-design/index.md) -
- [Essential UX Research Methods for 2024](https://gemika.vercel.app/posts/ux-research-methods/index.md) -
